ipt type="text/javascript"> $J( function() { InitAppTagModal( 1145360, [{"tagid":42804,"name":"Action Roguelike","count":1427,"browseable":true},{"tagid":3959,"name":"Roguelite","count":1037,"browseable":true},{"tagid":1646,"name":"Hack and Slash","count":1017,"browseable":true},{"tagid":492,"name":"Indie","count":1004,"browseable":true},{"tagid":16094,"name":"Mythology","count":990,"browseable":true},{"tagid":19,"name":"Action","count":871,"browseable":true},{"tagid":1716,"name":"Roguelike","count":840,"browseable":true},{"tagid":4182,"name":"Singleplayer","count":785,"browseable":true},{"tagid":1756,"name":"Great Soundtrack","count":757,"browseable":true},{"tagid":1742,"name":"Story Rich","count":733,"browseable":true},{"tagid":1720,"name":"Dungeon Crawler","count":697,"browseable":true},{"tagid":122,"name":"RPG","count":684,"browseable":true},{"tagid":4711,"name":"Replay Value","count":625,"browseable":true},{"tagid":5851,"name":"Isometric","count":485,"browseable":true},{"tagid":4026,"name":"Difficult","count":441,"browseable":true},{"tagid":6815,"name":"Hand-drawn","count":323,"browseable":true},{"tagid":4231,"name":"Action RPG","count":320,"browseable":true},{"tagid":4166,"name":"Atmospheric","count":311,"browseable":true},{"tagid":44868,"name":"LGBTQ+","count":112,"browseable":true},{"tagid":1759,"name":"Perma Death","count":111,"browseable":true}], [], "1_5_9__410", "1_5_9__411", null, false ); if ( typeof GDynamicStore != 'undefined' ) GDynamicStore.FixupNamePortion(); });
